gemini_verdict.title: Forward Deployed AI Engineer
gemini_verdict.summary: The Forward Deployed AI Engineer will partner with customers to design, build, and deploy intelligent applications using Python and LLMs. The role requires bridging engineering expertise with customer empathy to solve complex, real-world AI deployment problems.
